headline: SoFi Mastercard Stablecoin Deal Puts SoFiUSD And Valuation In Focus
summary: SoFi Technologies (NasdaqGS:SOFI) has partnered with Mastercard to use SoFiUSD, its fully reserved U.S. dollar stablecoin, as a settlement option across Mastercard’s global payments network. This marks the first time a stablecoin issued by a nationally chartered, insured U.S. bank is available on a public blockchain for settlement within a major payment network. The move aims to support payments, remittances, and B2B transfers using a regulatory compliant digital asset framework. SoFi...

headline: Mastercard Expands SoFiUSD Stablecoin Use As Shares Trade Below Targets
summary: Mastercard and SoFi are expanding their partnership to let SoFiUSD, a bank-issued stablecoin, be used for settlement on Mastercard’s global payments network. This marks the first time a stablecoin from a U.S. chartered and insured bank will be used for settlement at this scale. The move is aimed at supporting faster, more flexible cross-border and B2B payments using digital assets alongside traditional currencies. Mastercard, traded as NYSE:MA, is moving deeper into digital assets at a time...
